title: MarlinV3ExternalJSON
description: Schema for V3 external JSON format using short keys. This is what gets sent to the LLM.

g.description: Goal — the primary objective (short key for 'goal')

a.description: Action — the operation to perform (short key for 'action')

i.description: Inputs — parameters or data (short key for 'inputs')

c.description: Constraints — rules or limits (short key for 'constraints')

f.description: Format — desired output format (short key for 'format')
